old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-cbx4","title":"Refresh returning managed prefix egress","description":"When an expired RPL-managed prefix egress returns, restore the prefix to Fresh with its current rebuilt path while preserving absent fail-closed and static prefix behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"Disappear/reappear/reparent regression passes; absent managed prefix remains unusable; static prefixes are unchanged.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.894883241Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.894883241Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-cbx4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-d7uj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.980079036Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
